marketingPages.title: Pricing
marketingPages.subtitle: Choose the ops suites that fit your team size and workload.

pricingTiers.name: Starter
pricingTiers.description: Perfect for early teams building reliable ops habits.

pricingTiers.name: Scale
pricingTiers.description: For teams that need deeper automation and AI insights.

pricingTiers.name: Enterprise
pricingTiers.description: Tailored for large organizations with strict governance.

sections.title: Usage and add ons
sections.body: Aikya uses usage packs for heavy AI workloads and high frequency automations.
bullets: AI task packs at $99 per 10k actions
Audit archive retention at $15 per month

sections.title: Billing and security
sections.body: All plans include encryption at rest and in transit with flexible billing options.
bullets: Invoice and PO support for Scale and Enterprise
SOC 2 aligned controls for critical data

faq.question: Can I change plans later?
faq.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time with prorated billing.

faq.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes. The 14 day trial includes full platform access and starter integrations.

faq.question: Is there a self hosted option?
faq.answer: Enterprise customers can request private network or self hosted deployments.
